review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI final re-review verified packet self-list convention is fixed and machine-enforced, production_ready evidence absence is expected pre-promotion sequencing, M10.S01 handoff binding and completed P00 evidence requirements hold, weighted-title generator-alignment deferrals are resolved by contract-title override policy without generator rewrite, and the next boundary is RP00.P01.M00.S01 without P01 start or RP00 completion claims.

findings.title: Prior P3 packet self-list convention is fixed and machine-enforced
findings.details: packet.json is listed in required_review_files and in packet.files_for_review, and validator count/membership parity enforces the convention.

findings.title: production_ready and Claude gate notes are expected pre-C00 sequencing
findings.details: Before promotion the C00 and production readiness gates were pending as expected. This closeout attaches the review result, adjudication, and construction inspection before promotion.

parsed_review.review_notes: Initial actual Claude CLI review returned PASS with two P3 notes. The handoff packet/files binding note was fixed by adding packet.json to required_review_files and files_for_review plus validator parity. Final actual Claude CLI re-review returned PASS with only confirmation P3 notes and no P0/P1/P2 findings.
